Title: Verify that the orders page displays the correct page title
Preconditions: User is logged in and is on the orders page
Test Steps: 1. Observe the page title
Expected Result: Page title displays Orders
Actual Result: Page title displays Orders

Title: Verify that the breadcrumb on the orders page displays correctly
Preconditions: User is logged in and is on the orders page
Test Steps: 1. Observe the breadcrumb at the top of the page
Expected Result: Breadcrumb displays Home > My account > Orders. Home and My account are clickable links
Actual Result: Breadcrumb displays Home > My account > Orders. Home and My account are clickable links

Title: Verify that the left sidebar navigation displays all menu items
Preconditions: User is logged in and is on the orders page
Test Steps: 1. Observe the left sidebar
Expected Result: Sidebar displays Dashboard, Orders, Downloads, Addresses, Account details and Log out
Actual Result: Sidebar displays Dashboard, Orders, Downloads, Addresses, Account details and Log out

Title: Verify that the orders table displays the correct column headers
Preconditions: User is logged in and has at least one order
Test Steps: 1. Observe the orders table headers
Expected Result: Orders table displays Order, Date, Status, Total and Actions column headers
Actual Result: Orders table displays Order, Date, Status, Total and Actions column headers

Title: Verify that all placed orders are listed on the orders page
Preconditions: User is logged in and has placed 2 orders
Test Steps: 1. Observe the orders listed in the orders table
Expected Result: All previously placed orders are displayed with accurate details.
Actual Result: All previously placed orders are displayed with accurate details.

Title: Verify that the order number is displayed as a clickable link
Preconditions: User is logged in and is on the orders page
Test Steps: 1. Observe the order numbers in the orders table
Expected Result: Order numbers are displayed as clickable links.
Actual Result: Order numbers are displayed as clickable links.

Title: Verify that the order status is displayed correctly for each order
Preconditions: User is logged in and is on the orders page
Test Steps: 1. Observe the Status column for each order
Expected Result: Both orders display Processing as the status
Actual Result: Both orders display Processing as the status

Title: Verify that the order total and item count are displayed correctly
Preconditions: User is logged in and is on the orders page
Test Steps: 1. Observe the Total column for each order
Expected Result: Each order displays the correct total amount and item count.
Actual Result: Each order displays the correct total amount and item count.

Title: Verify that the View button is displayed for each order
Preconditions: User is logged in and is on the orders page
Test Steps: 1. Observe the Actions column for each order
Expected Result: Each order has a View button with an eye icon in the Actions column
Actual Result: Each order has a View button with an eye icon in the Actions column

Title: Verify that clicking the View button navigates to the order detail page
Preconditions: User is logged in and is on the orders page
Test Steps:
1. Click the View button on order #81
2. Observe the page that loads
Expected Result: Click the available order and verify navigation to its detail page.
Actual Result: Click the available order and verify navigation to its detail page.

Title: Verify that clicking the order number link navigates to the order detail page
Preconditions: User is logged in and is on the orders page
Test Steps:
1. Click the order number link #81
2. Observe the page that loads
Expected Result: Click the available order and verify navigation to its detail page.
Actual Result: Click the available order and verify navigation to its detail page.

Title: Verify orders page displays correctly when only one order exists
Preconditions: User has exactly one order
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to Orders page
Expected Result: Orders table displays one order correctly without layout issues.
Actual Result: Orders table displays one order correctly without layout issues.

Title: Verify orders page handles large number of orders correctly
Preconditions: User has 20+ orders
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to Orders page
Expected Result: Orders list loads successfully and all records display correctly.
Actual Result: Orders list loads successfully and all records display correctly.

Title: Verify order list loads correctly after page refresh
Preconditions: User has orders
Test Steps:
1. Open Orders page
2. Refresh browser
Expected Result: Orders remain visible and data remains unchanged.
Actual Result: Orders remain visible and data remains unchanged.

Title: Verify that the empty orders page displays the correct message
Preconditions: User is logged in with no orders placed
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to Orders
2. Observe the page content
Expected Result: Blue banner displays No order has been made yet. Browse products button is displayed on the right
Actual Result: Blue banner displays No order has been made yet. Browse products button is displayed on the right

Title: Verify that the Browse products button on the empty orders page navigates to the shop
Preconditions: User is logged in with no orders and is on the orders page
Test Steps:
1. Click the Browse products button
2. Observe the page that loads
Expected Result: User is navigated to the shop page
Actual Result: User is navigated to the shop page

Title: Verify that the order detail page displays the correct order summary text
Preconditions: User is logged in and is on the order #81 detail page
Test Steps: 1. Observe the summary text at the top of the order detail page
Expected Result: Text displays the order number, date it was placed and is current status
Actual Result: Order summary displays the correct order number, order date and current status.

Title: Verify that the order detail page displays all ordered products with correct quantities and prices
Preconditions: User is logged in and is on the order #81 detail page
Test Steps: 1. Observe the Order details table
Expected Result: Product details, subtotal, shipping cost and total amount are displayed accurately based on the order.
Actual Result: Product details, subtotal, shipping cost and total amount are displayed accurately based on the order.

Title: Verify that the subtotal on the order detail page is correct
Preconditions: User is logged in and is on the order #81 detail page
Test Steps: 1. Observe the Subtotal row in the order details table
Expected Result: Subtotal displays based on the order
Actual Result: Subtotal displays based on the order

Title: Verify that the shipping cost and method are displayed correctly on the order detail page
Preconditions: User is logged in and is on the order #81 detail page
Test Steps: 1. Observe the Shipping row in the order details table
Expected Result: The shipping method and shipping cost are displayed correctly based on the order.
Actual Result: The shipping method and shipping cost are displayed correctly based on the order.

Title: Verify that the total on the order detail page is correct
Preconditions: User is logged in and is on the order #81 detail page
Test Steps: 1. Observe the Total row in the order details table
Expected Result: Product details, subtotal, shipping cost and total amount are displayed accurately based on the order.
Actual Result: Product details, subtotal, shipping cost and total amount are displayed accurately based on the order.

Title: Verify that the payment method is displayed correctly on the order detail page
Preconditions: User is logged in and is on the order #81 detail page
Test Steps: 1. Observe the Payment method row in the order details table
Expected Result: Payment method displays Cash on delivery
Actual Result: Payment method displays Cash on delivery

Title: Verify that the product name on the order detail page is a clickable link
Preconditions: User is logged in and is on the order #81 detail page
Test Steps:
1. Click the Beanie with Logo product name link
2. Observe the page that loads
Expected Result: User is navigated to the Beanie with Logo product detail page
Actual Result: User is navigated to the Beanie with Logo product detail page

Title: Verify that the order detail page for selected order shows correct discount and total
Preconditions: User is logged in and is on the order #80 detail page
Test Steps:
1. Click View on order #80
2. Observe the order details table
Expected Result: Order detail page displays the correct subtotal, discounts, shipping information and final total.
Actual Result: Order detail page displays the correct subtotal, discounts, shipping information and final total.

Title: Verify that clicking Dashboard in the sidebar navigates to the account dashboard
Preconditions: User is logged in and is on the orders page
Test Steps:
1. Click Dashboard in the left sidebar
2. Observe the page that loads
Expected Result: User is navigated to the My Account dashboard page
Actual Result: User is navigated to the My Account dashboard page

Title: Verify that clicking Addresses in the sidebar navigates to the addresses page
Preconditions: User is logged in and is on the orders page
Test Steps:
1. Click Addresses in the left sidebar
2. Observe the page that loads
Expected Result: User is navigated to the Addresses page
Actual Result: User is navigated to the Addresses page

Title: Verify that clicking Account details in the sidebar navigates to the account details page
Preconditions: User is logged in and is on the orders page
Test Steps:
1. Click Account details in the left sidebar
2. Observe the page that loads
Expected Result: User is navigated to the Account details page
Actual Result: User is navigated to the Account details page

Title: Verify that clicking Log out in the sidebar logs the user out
Preconditions: User is logged in and is on the orders page
Test Steps:
1. Click Log out in the left sidebar
2. Observe the result
